detail.description:
The thrill of the hunt is calling. Begin your hunting adventure now! 

🌎 Hunt monsters in the real world:
Embark on a global quest to track down and hunt some of the most formidable monsters from the Monster Hunter universe as they appear in our world. Forge powerful weapons and team up with fellow hunters to track down larger-than-life monsters and take them head-on.

⚔️ Authentic hunting action carefully adapted to mobile:
Discover a variety of monsters depending on the habitat around you – F
detail.recentChanges:
Thank you for playing Monster Hunter Now.

Key Updates:
・A monster source filter has been added for weapons/armor.
・A filter has been added to the Item Box screen and the material disposal screen.
・You can now see the region of each participating hunter in a Paintball List Friend Link.

*For more detailed update information, please visit the Community Forum.
https://community.monsterhunternow.com
